title: Supercharge Your Marketing with AI Agent Skills!
contentMarkdown:
## 📝 Quick Summary: 
This repository provides a collection of specialized marketing skills for AI agents, enabling them to perform tasks like conversion optimization, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering. It's designed for technical marketers and founders to enhance AI coding agent capabilities.

## 🔑 Key Takeaways

- ✅ Empowers AI agents with specialized marketing knowledge and workflows.

- ✅ Covers a wide range of marketing disciplines, including SEO, CRO, copywriting, and growth.

- ✅ Skills are interconnected, building on a foundational understanding of product and audience.

- ✅ Significantly enhances efficiency and effectiveness for technical marketers and founders.

- ✅ Compatible with popular AI coding agents like Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, and Cursor.


## 📊 Project Statistics
- ⭐ Stars: 32401
- 🍴 Forks: 5320
- ❗ Open Issues: 6


## 🛠 Tech Stack
- ✅ JavaScript


Ever wished your AI coding assistant could do more than just write code? Imagine if it could brainstorm killer marketing copy, optimize your landing pages, or even plan your SEO strategy with an expert's touch. For technical marketers and founders, the dream of an AI assistant that truly understands and executes complex marketing tasks is now a reality thanks to a brilliant new GitHub project: Marketing Skills for AI Agents. This innovative collection equips your AI with specialized knowledge to tackle real-world marketing challenges.

At its core, this project provides 'skills' – essentially markdown files that imbue your AI agents with specific workflows and frameworks for various marketing tasks. Think of them as specialized playbooks or expert cheat sheets. When you integrate these skills into your project, your AI agent, whether it's Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Cursor, or Windsurf, can recognize when you're working on a marketing task. It then applies the right best practices and strategic approaches, moving beyond generic responses to deliver targeted, effective marketing output.

What makes this project particularly powerful is how these skills are designed to work together. They aren't isolated tools; they're interconnected, building on shared context. The foundational 'product-marketing' skill is read by all others first, ensuring your AI always understands your product, audience, and positioning before diving into any specific task. From there, a comprehensive ecosystem of skills branches out, covering everything from SEO & Content, CRO, Copywriting, Paid & Measurement, Growth & Retention, Sales & GTM, and even high-level Strategy. For example, the 'copywriting' skill might cross-reference 'CRO' and 'ab-testing' to ensure the generated copy is not just persuasive but also optimized for conversion and testability.

For developers and technical marketers, this means a significant boost in efficiency and effectiveness. Instead of manually feeding your AI agent every detail or framework, these skills provide a ready-made intelligence layer. You can leverage your AI to perform an SEO audit, craft compelling cold emails, optimize signup flows, generate ad creatives, or even develop a comprehensive content strategy. It transforms your AI coding agent into a powerful marketing co-pilot, saving you countless hours and helping you achieve better results in conversion optimization, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering. It's like having a seasoned marketing consultant embedded directly into your development workflow, ready to assist on demand and ensuring your marketing efforts are always strategically sound and data-informed.

## 📚 Learn More
[View the Project on GitHub](https://github.com/coreyhaines31/marketingskills)
